name: Strawberry Grand Marnier Cheesecake Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve 1 tablespoon each of the strawberries and walnuts for garnish.
2. In a small bowl, mix the strawberries, brown sugar, and liqueur. Set aside.
3. Blend the cream cheese and sour cream until smooth.
4. Add the strawberry mixture to the blended cream cheese and sour cream blend, mixing well.
5. Fold in the walnuts.
6. Mound the reserved strawberries in the center of a serving dish and ring with the reserved walnuts.
7. Cover and chill.
Makes about 3 1/2 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Chocolate Wafers or Crackers (Graham), Chocolate Chunks, Ladyfingers, Bananas
